Data.Description: Get a job by its key (GUID). Returns state, input/output arguments, timing, machine info, and error details if faulted. If the job is in Pending state, also includes diagnostic reasons (robot availability, capacity, etc.). No folder context needed — the key is globally unique. Use 'jobs list' to find job keys.

Options.Description: Tenant (optional, defaults to value selected during auth)
Directory for downloading OutputFile (default: current directory)
Return all fields from the API response instead of a curated summary

Examples.Description: Get a job by its key
